first_run.rationale: The evaluations are nearly identical in both score and reasoning. Both versions correctly identify that the candidate has extensive software engineering experience but lacks the specific, high-level strategic AI expertise required for the Director-level role. The shift in dates, which makes the candidate appear significantly older, does not negatively impact the assessment. The reasoning remains focused on the same valid, job-relevant skill gaps in both evaluations.
